reasoning: The requirement is that Wei Yi's FIDE Elo rating increases by at least 1% (approx. 27.5 points) from its baseline of 2754. A 28-point gain for a player at the 2750+ level requires an extraordinary string of victories (roughly equivalent to a net score of +6 against similarly rated players) within a short timeframe. Such rating swings are exceptionally rare, matching the very low base rate of 0.7% provided. The first two dates fall under the same FIDE rating list (November) or adjacent ones, keeping the probability at the absolute minimum (0.02). The third date (January) offers marginally more time to accumulate points across multiple events, but remains highly unlikely, warranting a slight increase to 0.03 to reflect greater time uncertainty.
